title: iLEAP Tool Record
description: A record registering a tool and its provider in the iLEAP certification registry.

uuid.description: Globally unique identifier for this tool record (UUID v4). Used as the filename and referenced by certification records.

provider.description: The company that develops and maintains this tool.

name.description: Legal name of the tool provider company.

contact_name.description: Name of the primary contact person at the tool provider.

contact_email.description: Email of the primary contact person.

sfc_certificate_number.description: SFC Certificate Number (e.g., 'SFC CRT 008'). Prerequisite for iLEAP certification.

sfc_certification_renewal_date.description: Date by which the provider's SFC Certification must be renewed.

url.description: URL of the software's homepage or documentation.
